/usr/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/DOG.dir/src/dog_hardware.cpp.o -o DOG   -L/usr/local/include/eigen3  -L/usr/local/include/osqp  -L/usr/local/include/OsqpEigen  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/include/eigen3:/usr/local/include/osqp:/usr/local/include/OsqpEigen:/usr/local/lib ../../my_lib/libmy_lib.a -lpthread /usr/local/lib/libboost_filesystem.so.1.71.0 /usr/local/lib/libboost_system.so.1.71.0 -lOsqpEigen -losqp
